slides.title: Validating User Input ✅
slides.content:
# Adding Validation

You can validate form input in real-time (as the user types) or on submit. Common validations include:

* Required fields
* Email format
* Minimum length
* Password match

## Example: Real-time Validation

We can add an error state and update it in the change handler.

slides.title: Validation on Change

quizData.question: Validation can be done both in real-time (onChange) and on submit.
quizData.explanation: Yes, many forms validate as the user types to give immediate feedback, and also validate again on submit.
